title: koeleria vallesiana subvar. pubescens
intro: Koeleria vallesiana subvar. pubescens, also known as the hairy June grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Koeleria vallesiana subvar. pubescens have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Koeleria vallesiana subvar. pubescens can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
